track_label: Background diesel efficiency drift — rail passenger
track_description: Exogenous diesel efficiency improvement from background fleet renewal (new-generation diesel multiple units, improved fuel injection, waste-heat recovery). Rate: -0.4%/yr compounding; multiplier 1.000 → 0.905 by 2050. Applies to conventional_mixed (diesel input only).
evidence_summary: European DMU fuel efficiency improvement trend; Australian regional fleet renewal programmes; NGA fuel intensity improvement.
derivation_method: Energy coefficients from AES 2025 Table F1 rail (64.9 PJ total = 52 PJ diesel + 12.9 PJ electricity, 2023-24); passenger share = 16.0 PJ (electricity 12.9 + regional diesel 3.1). BITRE 22,000 million_pkm gives 727.0 GJ/million_pkm. Split: 586 GJ electricity (urban metro) + 141 GJ diesel (regional). NGGI check (scope 1 diesel): 9.9 × 22,000 / 1e6 = 0.22 MtCO2e.
double_counting_guardrail: Applies to diesel input in conventional_mixed only. Fully electrified, hydrogen, and battery states excluded. Non-stacking with timetable optimisation package.
review_notes: Rate of -0.4%/yr is consistent with European DMU fleet trend.

track_label: Background electric traction efficiency drift — rail passenger
track_description: Exogenous electricity-intensity improvement from improved power electronics, inverter efficiency, and modern traction motors. Rate: -0.3%/yr compounding; multiplier 1.000 → 0.928 by 2050. Applies to conventional_mixed and fully_electrified states (electricity input).
evidence_summary: European electric rail efficiency trend; IEA rail energy efficiency data; Siemens/Bombardier traction drive efficiency improvements.
derivation_method: Energy coefficients from AES 2025 Table F1 rail (64.9 PJ total = 52 PJ diesel + 12.9 PJ electricity, 2023-24); passenger share = 16.0 PJ (electricity 12.9 + regional diesel 3.1). BITRE 22,000 million_pkm gives 727.0 GJ/million_pkm. Split: 586 GJ electricity (urban metro) + 141 GJ diesel (regional). NGGI check (scope 1 diesel): 9.9 × 22,000 / 1e6 = 0.22 MtCO2e.
double_counting_guardrail: Applies to conventional_mixed (electricity input) and fully_electrified. Non-stacking with regenerative braking package.
review_notes: Rate of -0.3%/yr aligned with historical electric rail intensity improvement.
